mapper.select: SELECT i.* FROM sys_flow_form_instance i WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND i.process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId} LIMIT 1
SELECT i.* FROM sys_flow_form_instance i WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND i.business_key = #{businessKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_flow_form_instance SET process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_flow_form_instance SET status = #{status}, end_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId} AND deleted = 0
